products.name: Miele di manuka
pros: Antimicrobial properties due to hydrogen peroxide and low water activity
Traditionally used in medicine for its healing effects

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review highlights Miele di manuka honey’s antimicrobial properties, MGO content, and traditional medicinal use, providing fresh evidence for its recommendation.
